title: NoMoreJumpscares
description: Removes the Elder Guardian curse effect when receiving mining fatigue
body: # NoMoreJumpscares ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loaders-Fabric%2fQuilt%2fNeoForge-lightblue?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Versions-1.20.2_|_1.21_|_26.1_|_26.2-lightblue?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environments-Client-lightblue?style=for-the-badge) ### Removes the Elder Guardian curse effect when receiving mining fatigue! - **Disabled** Elder Guardian curse particle popup *and* curse sound - This mod **only** disables the jumpscare, **not** the mining fatigue effect - Purely *client-side*, **no server-side functionality** #### For any issues or feature requests, please make a report on [GitHub](https://github.com/CoolAid48/NoMoreJumpscares/issues) [](https://ko-fi.com/coolaid48) [](https://discord.gg/J2SGshKNah) [](https://www.twitch.tv/coolaid48) ## Looking for a server host? ![server hosting partner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e85210a65b7c17998987c57b7571ba2fbd19bfb.png)
